description: Add advanced search filters (entity filter, sort, clear) to the music search app. This includes: updating the iTunes API function to accept an entity parameter, creating a SearchFilters client component with filter-by-entity buttons (Song/Artist/Album), sort-by dropdown (Relevance/Release Date/Artist Name), and a Clear Filters button, integrating filters into the main page via URL search params, and applying client-side sorting to results.
steps: Update lib/itunes.ts: modify searchTracks to accept an optional 'entity' parameter. When entity is 'song', pass entity=musicTrack. When entity is 'artist', pass entity=musicArtist. When entity is 'album', pass entity=album. Default (no filter or 'all') keeps current behavior (media=music).

Create app/components/SearchFilters.tsx as a 'use client' component. It should read current URL search params (filter, sort) and provide: (1) Filter buttons for All/Song/Artist/Album that update the 'filter' URL param, (2) A sort dropdown for Relevance/Release Date/Artist Name that updates the 'sort' URL param, (3) A Clear Filters button that removes filter and sort params. Active filters should be visually indicated with accent styling. Use responsive Tailwind classes - stack vertically on mobile, horizontal on desktop. Use semantic HTML (fieldset/legend or nav with aria labels).

Update app/page.tsx: (1) Read 'filter' and 'sort' search params from the URL (alongside existing 'q'). (2) Pass the filter param to searchTracks. (3) Apply client-side sorting to results before rendering: 'releaseDate' sorts by releaseDate descending, 'artistName' sorts alphabetically by artistName. 'relevance' keeps API order. (4) Render the SearchFilters component between the search bar and results, only when a query is active.

Ensure the SearchFilters component is fully responsive: on mobile, filter buttons wrap and sort dropdown takes full width. On desktop, everything sits in a single row. Active filter buttons use bg-accent text-white styling while inactive ones use border styling.
acceptance_criteria: bun run build passes without errors
bun run lint passes without errors
SearchFilters component renders filter buttons (All, Song, Artist, Album) and sort dropdown (Relevance, Release Date, Artist Name)
Active filter button is visually distinct (accent colored)
Clear Filters button appears when any non-default filter or sort is active
Filter and sort state is managed via URL search params (filter, sort)
Sorting is applied to search results before rendering
Component uses semantic HTML and responsive Tailwind classes
Filters update results without a full page refresh (using router.push with shallow navigation)
findings: Fixed the core bug: search filters now use the correct iTunes API entity parameter (entity=musicArtist for artist filter, entity=album for album filter) instead of always using entity=musicTrack with different attribute params. Created separate searchArtists() and searchAlbums() API functions, added ItunesArtist and ItunesAlbum types, and created ArtistCard/ArtistGrid and AlbumCard/AlbumGrid components for proper display of each result type. Build and lint pass cleanly.
